claims.summary: Semantic thinning may require semantic_projection_bias, recovery_fill_boost, or hard_reset_rho_floor adjustment.
claims.rationale: Those changes alter Minime live runtime/control surfaces and require Tier 5 Mike/operator approval plus sandbox/replay evidence before implementation.

claims.summary: High-entropy contact-depth and raw entropy outpacing semantic trickle should be visible before control is applied.
claims.rationale: Existing receptivity_buffer_review_v1 tests show review_ready/hold_shelf_cage/contact_starved_prediction_heavy states while candidate_local_control_applied and live_control_changed stay false.

claims.summary: local_control_applied=false despite pressure risk needs investigation rather than silent retune.
claims.rationale: The existing review helper routes local-control candidates to sandbox replay or operator approval; changing the application threshold would affect live controller behavior.
